name: IdsEdwPEsiMbrEligDrvrExtract

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT MBR_SK, AUDIT_TBL_NM, ACTN_CD, PRCS_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, AUDIT_TS FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_ESI_MBR_ELIG_DRVR WHERE PRCS_DT_SK = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}') SELECT MBR_SK, AUDIT_TBL_NM, ACTN_CD, PRCS_DT_SK, SRC_SYS_CD, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, AUDIT_TS FROM cte

Description:

CALLED BY:        EdwMbrNoDriverSeq

DESCRIPTION:  
  Pulls data from IDS P_ESI_MBR_ELIG_DRVR to edw.

Annotations:
IDS's  W_MBR_DEL is the extraction "driver" table and is used in all of the extract jobs that are member uniq key or subscriber uniq key dependant.  

It serves as a driver table for membership extractions.   It is very similar to the EDW W_MBR_DEL but IDS has SKs and the EDW version doesn't.
Job Name: IdsEdwPEsiMbrEligDrvrExtract
This Job pulls records from IDS's MBR and SUB tables that have a run cycle nbr according to  IDS P_RUN_CYC have a EDW_LOAD_IN = \"N\".  Loads to the \"driver\" tables.
Load File for EDW P_ESI_MBR_ELIG_DRVR
Read all from IDS P_ESI_MBR_ELIG_DRVR
